topic: distance-rate-time word problem, multi-step with relational information
latex:
Avani and her family are visiting family in another part of the country. They decided that they would take the scenic route, taking a three-day road trip.

\begin{itemize}
\item On Wednesday they drove at an average speed of $50$ mph for $2$ hours.
\item On Thursday they drove at an average speed of $35$ mph for $6$ hours.
\item On Friday they drove $20$ mph faster than on Thursday for $7$ hours.
\end{itemize}

What was the total distance traveled?
